synthesis.notes: The precursor total mass was 140 mg with B:MgO:MgB2 = 2:1:1.5 molar ratio. BNNTs were deposited on Si/SiO2 substrate placed in the center of the tube above the precursor. The as-grown BNNTs can be further purified by washing with dilute hydrochloric acid to remove residual MgO and Mg3B2O6. MgB2 acts as a VLS catalyst, with MgB2 nanoparticles detected at the tips of the BNNTs. All three components (B, MgO, MgB2) are indispensable for BNNT growth.
